completed_slice: Implemented a deterministic fail-closed adapter from recognized owner-scoped queue-update fields into the effective-state reducer patch contract.
verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed: supported-field mapping, owner mismatch rejection, status rejection, source-path rejection, and explicit omitted-field recording.
remaining: Enumerate and classify all historical queue-update record shapes.
Derive commit reachability from repository ancestry rather than caller input.
Batch-normalize admissible updates and generate an attested materialized effective-state view.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract state-reconciliation semantics only; no private chat, health, credentials, identifying personal data, or unreviewed uploads.
rollback: Revert commits 4bf28aaa7f91e184e2fda245f310650bd9ff8b17 and 30aaf7c326ad1fc08955994a4ac8cb54d75f0fe8 to remove the test and normalizer.
